briefdescription.para: Enables the specified interrupts in the device.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be enabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XSYSMONPSV_IER_* bits defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h.
Interrupt enable register to be used.

briefdescription.para: Returns the enabled interrupts read from the Interrupt Mask Register (IMR).

detaileddescription.para: Use the XSYSMONPSV_IMR0_* and XSYSMONPSV_IMR1_* constants defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h to interpret the returned value.

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt enable register to be used

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the Interrupt Mask Registers.

briefdescription.para: Disables the specified interrupts in the device.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be disabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XSYSMONPSV_IDR_* bits defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h.
Interrupt disable register to be used.

briefdescription.para: Returns the interrupt status read from Interrupt Status Register(ISR).

detaileddescription.para: Use the XSYSMONPSV_ISR* constants defined in xsysmonpsv_hw.h to interpret the returned value.

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

briefdescription.para: Clears the specified interrupts in the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit-mask of the interrupts to be cleared. Bit positions of 1 will be cleared. Bit positions of 0 will not change the previous interrupt status.*

briefdescription.para: Sets a supply as a source new data interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: 32 bit Mask for NEW_DATA_n fields in the interrupt registers
